title: Suspendable procedures never split into multiple files

features.name: initial block calling multiple tasks with timing delays
features.description: Code should include an initial block that calls multiple tasks, where each task contains timing delay controls

features.name: task with fork-join inside initial block
features.description: Code should include a task with fork-join concurrent statements, called from an initial block

features.name: nested task calls with delays in initial block
features.description: Code should include an initial block calling a task that calls another task with timing delays
